title: Actionbar Damage Indicator
body:
An unofficial fork of [ToroHealth Damage Indicators Updated](https://modrinth.com/mod/torohealth-damage-indicators-updated) but with an actionbar display for HUD
Commissioned by @sandwhoop

When you look at a mob and it takes damage, you will see how much damage they look from a message in your actionbar




PLEASE DO NOT REPORT ISSUES WITH THIS MOD TO TOROHEALTH DAMAGE INDICATORS, INSTEAD REPORT THEM [HERE](https://github.com/ekulxam/actionbar-damage-indicator/issues)
